description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge display dominating the front, featuring a vibrant, abstract wallpaper with swirling orange, purple, and white hues. The device has a sleek, black exterior with rounded corners and a slim profile, typical of high-end mobile phones. On the back, there is a dual camera module positioned vertically in the top left corner, accompanied by a small flash. The sides of the phone are smooth, with subtle button placements visible along the edges. The front screen appears to have a notch at the top, likely housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The overall design is minimalist and premium, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek, black modern smartphone with a large, vibrant display and a dual camera module on the back. The design is minimalist, with rounded corners and a slim profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, edge-to-edge display with a colorful abstract wallpaper and a top notch.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slimness of the device and subtle button placements along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black back, dual camera module in the top left, and no visible branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the thinness and smooth edge of the phone.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a vibrant, abstract wallpaper with swirling orange, purple, and white colors. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Dual camera module located vertically in the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a small flash.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are subtly visible along the right edge, likely including a power button and volume rocker.
